name: Woven Washed Windowpane Throw Pillow - Threshold™
description:
Add a sophisticated accent to your space with the Woven Washed Windowpane Pillow from Threshold™. This decorative throw pillow features a solid-hued background decked out in a tonal windowpane woven design that adds a pop of color and pattern to your seating. Featuring a soft fabric exterior and a comfy filled interior, this accent throw pillow lends cushioned comfort as you sit, relax or lounge, while the zipper closure offers added convenience for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
